incident_summary: Signal failure at Times Square affecting 4/5/6 lines. Multiple trains delayed.
detailed_report: Complete signal system failure at Times Square-42nd Street complex at 08:15. Track circuit T42-A15 showing continuous red indication. Four trains held in stations between 14th St and 59th St. MEIT responded at 08:20. Single tracking implemented at 08:35. Full service restored at 08:45.
expected_summary: 30-minute signal failure at Times Square complex affected 4/5/6 service. Single tracking implemented for recovery. Service restored after MEIT intervention.

incident_summary: Power outage at Harvard Square suspending Red Line service north of Central.
detailed_report: Traction power failure reported at 16:42 affecting Harvard-Porter section. Emergency power protocols activated. All Red Line trains held south of Central Square. Bus shuttle service activated Harvard-Alewife at 17:00. Power restored by electrical crew at 17:27. Service testing commenced 17:30. Normal service resumed 17:45.
expected_summary: 45-minute power outage suspended Red Line service north of Central. Bus shuttle provided while electrical crew restored power.
